mapper.select: SELECT eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, eval_year AS evalYear, eval_sequence AS evalSequence, end_date AS endDate, DATEDIFF(end_date, CURDATE()) AS daysRemaining, status FROM evaluation_period WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1
SELECT eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe.status, CASE WHEN qe.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN true ELSE false END AS submitted FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN employee tl ON tl.employee_id = #{tlId} WHERE qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND e.department_id = tl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' ORDER BY e.employee_name

SELECT qe2.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe2.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe1.score AS firstStageScore, NULL AS aiRecommendedScore, qe2.status FROM qualitative_evaluation qe2 JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 AND qe1.status = 'SUBMITTED' JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id JOIN employee dl ON dl.employee_id = #{dlId} WHERE qe2.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 AND e.department_id = dl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' ORDER BY e.employee_name

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe.evaluator_id AS evaluatorId, qe.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, qe.evaluation_level AS evaluationLevel, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.input_method AS inputMethod, qe.status, qe.created_at AS createdAt FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id WHERE qe.qualitative_evaluation_id = #{evalId} AND qe.evaluator_id = #{tlId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, tl.employee_name AS evaluatorName, qe.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.score AS firstStageScore, qe.grade AS firstStageGrade, NULL AS aiRecommendedScore, qe.status FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id LEFT JOIN employee tl ON tl.employee_id = qe.evaluator_id WHERE qe.evaluatee_id = #{evaluateeId} AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND qe.status = 'SUBMITTED'

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe.evaluator_id AS evaluatorId, qe.evaluation_period_id AS evaluationPeriodId, qe.evaluation_level AS evaluationLevel, qe.eval_items AS evalItems, qe.eval_comment AS evalComment, qe.grade, qe.score, qe.input_method AS inputMethod, qe.status, qe.created_at AS createdAt FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id WHERE qe.qualitative_evaluation_id = #{evalId}

SELECT grade, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG(score) AS avgScore FROM qualitative_evaluation WHERE evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND grade IS NOT NULL GROUP BY grade ORDER BY FIELD(grade, 'S', 'A', 'B', 'C')
